item.title: Sha Carri anchors USA's 4x100 World Title. :)
item.description: #sports #400m #unmuted Nobody is catching Sha Carri... :)
item.dc:creator: Luvlyquants

item.title: When people hit you and break your teeth because your Trans
item.description: And people still fucking ask why protest, pride month's and visibility is important. Frontpage Edit: I went to bed shortly after posting this, wow this blew up. Thank you everyone for your kind words (And may you "others" have diarrhea and temporary disabled arms for a day ) The German healthcare system took care of everything so far. So thank you once more for all the kind offers. But Financial help is not needed. I am glad for all my friends and loved ones. I am glad those people are in the minority. But they certainly are out there and are not afraid to use violence. So go out there and vote. What happens in the EU and all over the world with the right wing growing in strength is worrisome to say the least.
item.dc:creator: xuneneko

item.title: Lol
item.description: Unrelated to this post but just wanted to thank this Imgur community for being great. Made a post a month ago about being poor and having anxiety, got helped with food and counseling and finally landed a job for next month. Thank you for being awesome https://imgur.com/gallery/never-would-have-been-able-to-try-if-wasnt-you-guys-Y8SHoDS

item.title: Strong Girls! Shiho and Patty
item.description:
Shiho Yoshimura, Source: https://x.com/PhelippeTom/status/1765937950737474043
LeanBeefPatty, Source: https://x.com/PhelippeTom/status/1640900764292841474
Source: https://x.com/PhelippeTom/status/1640900764292841474
Source: https://x.com/PhelippeTom/status/1527833700544692224 All art is by Wellington Phelippe. https://x.com/PhelippeTom - - - - - Today's fanart is of two exceptional women! Shiho Yoshimura is a professional volleyball player from Japan, and even picked up the Best New Face Award when she joined the Ageo Medics. Shiho's Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/shiho_yoshimura/ LeanBeefPatty is a fitness influencer from California. She's got a huge following on her fitness channel and TikTok. Patty's Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/leanbeefpatty/ - - - - Is there a strong woman that you admire? Let me know! Most Viral Edit: Tell me your thirst, and I'll add it to the fountain! Remember to hydrate, it's only getting hotter out there.
item.dc:creator: Bjr4life

item.dc:creator: deafkitten

item.title: Was this change necessary?
item.description: It was soo much easier to activate immediately as a video starts instead of having to scroll down and rewind. And rewinding never lets off at the beginning of the clip in the first place so now you have to watch it multiple times to see the whole thing unbothered. It's like they slow down the site for days to make these little annoying changes, then everyone hates them and they go, "oh, you don't like that? Okay, we'll change it back". Then that takes forever and by that point they add another ridiculously annoying change. Notifications are still fucked, 'mark all as read' still doesn't work. Come on, now, Imgur.. get it together. Edit: this seems to be fixed now, along with that huge "just wait!" button in the notifications. This went down after all of this time just as I was complaining here.
item.dc:creator: BlasphemousJones
